diagrams.title: Secure Coding Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the stages of secure software development from planning to maintenance
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the comprehensive approach to building secure applications

diagrams.title: Input Validation Flow
diagrams.description: Visualizes how input validation works as a gatekeeper for all user data
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the importance of validating all external data before processing

diagrams.title: XSS Attack vs Defense
diagrams.description: Shows how XSS attacks work and defense mechanisms
elements: Defense: Input Validation + Output Encoding + CSP + HttpOnly Cookies
diagrams.purpose: Understanding multiple layers of XSS protection

diagrams.title: SQL Injection Prevention Methods
diagrams.description: Comparison of insecure vs secure query handling
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how to prevent SQL injection at code level
